problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of mRNA. mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
